description: Open a Canvas card's linked Markdown file in a right-side editor pane with one click. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Canvas Markdown Side Editor

name: Canvas Markdown Side Editor

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Live Preview view mode (#20)

Adds a fourth view mode — **Live Preview** — that embeds a real Obsidian MarkdownView inside the side panel, giving file cards the full live-preview experience: rendered wikilinks, callouts, embeds, hidden markers, cursor-aware syntax. Text cards transparently fall back to source CM6 (no TFile to bind a detached leaf to).

### Toolbar cycle
`editor` → `live` → `both` → `preview` → `editor` (monotonically "more rendered")

### Settings
The **Default view mode** dropdown now includes **Live Preview**. Live Preview applies to file cards only; text cards keep using the Editor.

### Under the hood
- Hosts a detached `WorkspaceLeaf` with `mode: 'source', source: false` to force Live Preview rendering
- Uses Obsidian 1.7.2+ `leaf.loadIfDeferred()` to resolve the cold-start `DeferredView` race that issue #9 hit
- `saveCurrentEdits` flushes the leaf's buffer so panel-close / canvas-switch never lose typed-but-unsaved content

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ShawnSWu/Obsidian-Canvas-Markdown-Side-Editor/compare/1.8.1...1.9.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

  - **Ctrl+X (Cut)** is now supported inside the side editor. Previously this hotkey was captured by Canvas's "cut node"
   handler before our editor could see it; the side editor now installs an Obsidian keymap scope that intercepts Mod+X
  only while focus is in the editor — Canvas's own cut-node behavior is unchanged everywhere else.
  - **Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y (Undo / Redo)** is now supported. The editor now wires the standard CodeMirror history extension
  and history keymap.

  ## Internal

  - Removed dead fields and an unused method left over from earlier iterations.

  **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ShawnSWu/Obsidian-Canvas-Markdown-Side-Editor/compare/1.8.0...1.8.1

releases.author: ShawnSWu
releases.description:
# Canvas Markdown Side Editor v1.3.0 – smoother side editing, image paste, and preview toggle
## Highlights
- **Right-side editor** opens on single-click from Canvas Text/File ([.md](cci:7://file:///c:/Users/shawn.wu/Obsidian/CanvasMdSideEditor/.obsidian/plugins/canvas-markdown-side-editor/AGENTS.md:0:0-0:0)) cards, with auto-save on background click or card switch.
- **Image paste** directly into the editor: files are saved to your Vault and links are inserted based on Obsidian settings (`attachmentFolderPath`, `useMarkdownLinks`).
- **Preview toggle command**: `Canvas Side Editor: Toggle Preview` (`cmside-toggle-preview`) to quickly show/hide preview.
- **Smoother UX**: more reliable single-click detection, and the side editor closes gracefully during Canvas [zoomToSelection](cci:1://file:///c:/Users/shawn.wu/Obsidian/CanvasMdSideEditor/.obsidian/plugins/canvas-markdown-side-editor/src/main.ts:243:12-253:14) to avoid UI conflicts.
- **Polish**: custom icons (`cmside-two-cols` / `cmside-one-col`) and refined styles.  
- **Docs**: README updated with a new screenshot and cleanup.
